approval.dev_start_tooltip: Start implementation immediately with the selected Developer agent
approval.wip_warning: {{count}} active plans — review bottleneck risk. Reducing WIP is recommended.

drafting.empty_details_warning: Some subtasks are missing detailed design.
drafting.no_subtasks_hint: No subtasks. Ask Architect in Chat to revise the Plan.
drafting.detail_design_prompt:
[Detailed design request] "{{title}}"

Please add **implementation method (how)** to each subtask in the Plan below.
For each subtask, write to details: files to modify/create, approach, and caveats.

{{planContext}}

Propose the revised Plan with detailed design in `<!-- tunaflow:plan-proposal -->` format.

subtask.follow_up_suffix: Please proceed with the task above.

plans_panel.empty_plan_check: No plans under review. Chat with Architect to propose a Plan.

plan_document.empty_task_instructions: Not yet written — request it from Architect during the Subtask Review step.

doom_loop.title_one_fail: ⚠️ Review failed once — prior cycle had design review history
doom_loop.title_many_fails: ⚠️ Review failed {{count}} times in a row — entering design review
doom_loop.body_one_fail: If the same pattern repeats, design review may be needed again. Check the history below.
doom_loop.body_many_fails: Repeating issues that Rework cannot resolve. Use the history below to revise the subtask design.

actions.sync_doc_tooltip_busy: Architect is busy in the main chat. Available once complete.
actions.sync_doc_tooltip_normal: Reflect into Plan doc — if you edited task-NN.md files directly, back-propagate them into the main plan.md. Usually not needed in the normal flow.
actions.debug_all_tasks_tooltip: Debug — request all subtask instructions in one batch
actions.approve_tooltip_doom: We recommend approving after the Architect redesign
actions.approve_tooltip_busy: Architect is working in the main chat. Enabled once complete.
actions.approve_tooltip_missing: {{count}} task instructions missing — finish all instructions first.

card.empty_instructions: Task instructions have not been written yet.
card.opinion_placeholder: Write your review feedback (why revision is needed)...

review_ready.impl_complete_label: Implementation complete — ready for Review phase

review_fallback.no_verdict_hint: Reviewer marker not detected. Decide manually.
review_fallback.back_to_dev_tooltip: If Review RT entry failed, revert to Dev-complete state. The existing review branch is archived.
review_fallback.back_to_dev_event_reason: Back to Dev — Review entry failed

rework_notice.heading: Rework needed — sending Review findings to Developer.
rework_notice.fail_hint_next: Another failure will escalate to design review.

add_subtasks.line_hint: One per line (markdown list format OK)
add_subtasks.textarea_placeholder:
1. First task
2. Second task
3. Third task

rework.design_review_required_title: ⚠️ Design review required — Architect redesign in progress
rework.design_review_required_body: Escalated after 5+ Review failures in the previous cycle. Review/approve the Architect's rev proposal, then restart Dev.
rework.review_failed_once_title: ⚠️ Review failed once — prior cycle had a design review
rework.review_failed_once_body: If the same pattern repeats, another design review may be needed. If Rework doesn't resolve it, request an Architect redesign.
rework.review_failed_many_title: ⚠️ Review failed {{count}} times in a row — design review required
rework.review_failed_many_body: The same issue keeps recurring and Rework is not resolving it. Review the Subtask design and ask the Architect for revisions.
rework.rework_needed: Rework needed — Review pointed out the following items.
rework.design_review_suggested: ⚠️ Repeated failures on the same file — design review is recommended instead of Rework.

rereview.reverify_note: Re-verified with focus on whether the items above were fixed.

review_entry_failed.title: Review entry failed — retry
review_entry_failed.body:
Review RT failed while entering at stage "{{stage}}". The plan phase has been rolled back to implementation.

Reason: {{reason}}
review_entry_failed.toast: Review entry failed ({{stage}}). Plan phase rolled back to implementation.

review_prompt.prev_findings_footer: > Verify whether the items above were resolved.
review_prompt.scope_note: **Review scope**: review only Task {{ids}}. The other subtasks passed in the previous review.
review_prompt.body:
### 🔍 {{roundLabel}} request

**Plan**: "{{title}}"

**Verification documents**:
- Plan: `docs/plans/{{slug}}.md`
{{taskScope}}{{scopeNote}}{{prevFindings}}

Validate the implementation against each task file's **Change description** and **Verification**.
Code style not specified in the Plan, or existing issues in files outside scope, are not fail reasons.

> Submit the review verdict when done.

sub_plan_prompt.body: This subtask is complex enough to require its own Plan.
sub_plan_prompt.instruction: Propose a separate Plan for this subtask in `<!-- tunaflow:plan-proposal -->` format.

rework_prompt.heading: ### 🔄 Rework
rework_prompt.pressure_next: Another failure will escalate to design review.
rework_prompt.target_other_note: **Other {{count}} tasks**: already done — do not modify.
rework_prompt.completion_condition: > Completion: resolve all items above and notify.
rework_prompt.scope_restriction_suffix: Do not modify code in other tasks.

status.promoted_label: Plan "{{title}}" — registered in the Plan tab{{locationHint}}
status.overwrite_done_tooltip: Reopen the completed Plan with this proposal (active + Approval)
status.overwrite_active_tooltip: Overwrite the existing Plan with this proposal (reset to Approval + archive branches)

warn_empty.title: Subtasks not recognized
warn_empty.body: The agent may have written subtasks in an invalid format. The parser accepts:

confirm.reopen_body:
Reopen the completed Plan "{{title}}" with this proposal?

- The {{statusLabel}} Plan will be restored to active and enter the Dev phase
- Existing subtasks will all be replaced with the proposal
- Archived impl/review branches remain archived (not reused — a new branch is created on next Dev start)
- Already modified files are not auto-reverted
confirm.overwrite_body:
Overwrite the existing Plan "{{title}}" with this proposal?

- Existing subtasks will all be replaced
- Running implementation/review branches will be archived
- Phase resets to Approval so Dev can start
- Already modified files are not auto-reverted (handle manually if needed)

toast.promote_branch_error: Plan registration failed: select the parent conversation and try again.

doc_prompt.body:
### 📋 Document writing request

**Plan**: "{{title}}"

**Documents to write**:
- `docs/plans/{{slug}}.md` — full plan
{{taskFiles}}

**Contents for each task spec**:
- **Changed files** — target file paths (with line numbers if possible)
- **Change description** — implementation approach (step by step)
- **Dependencies** — dependencies (packages, other subtasks)
- **Verification** — **executable shell commands** that prove completion (e.g. `cargo test`, `npx tsc --noEmit`)
- **Risks** — risks and caveats
- **Scope boundary** — list of files NOT to modify (prevents invading other tasks)

> Completion: notify when all documents are written

proposal.example_subtasks_markdown:
### Subtasks        ← triple # required
1. First task — description
2. Second task — description

verdict.code_rewrite_tooltip: Send findings to DEV and switch straight to implementation
verdict.redesign_tooltip: Return to Plan phase — Architect redesigns from the start
verdict.done_confirm_suffix: . Completing as-is may not produce expected behavior.
verdict.redesign_success: Original plan abandoned. Architect is starting a redesign.
verdict.redesign_event_reason: Review failed — original abandoned, redesign requested
verdict.findings_empty_conditional: (No detailed findings — check the Review Branch directly)
verdict.findings_empty_redesign: - (No detailed findings — refer to the Review Branch)
